title: RedLogic
description: Advanced redstone wires, gates, lamps, and cleanrooms.
body:
RedLogic is a replacement for the Wiring, Logic, and Lighting parts of RedPower, on top of adding extra features.

Features:

* New redstone wires:
    * Red Alloy Wires (can be placed on walls and ceilings in addition to floors, have a longer range; Freestanding variant can be placed freely),
    * Insulated Wires (colored, do not connect to wires of other colors),
    * Bundled Cables (combine sixteen different Insulated signals in one wire),
* Various redstone logic gates
* Lamps:
    * Indicator (no light level change), Normal, Decorative (always-on) lamps,
    * Inverted lamp variants,
    * Flat and cage lamp variants (different shapes)
* Glowing Lumar Buttons and Plates - in regular, latchable and self-latchable variants
* Integrated Circuits - compile your RedLogic creations down to one block by building a cleanroom

## Archival notice

**This mod is abandoned and has been uploaded for archival purposes. It was originally created by [immibis](http://immibis.com/mcmoddl/). It has been uploaded to Modrinth under the ModrinthArchives account with permission from the original author.**

![Discord screenshot showing permission to upload](https://cdn.modrinth.com/archives/immibis-permission.png)
